items.title: Weekly Manager Digest v2 (actionable next steps)
items.hypothesis: If the digest includes a clear next-best-action per alert, managers will act within 48h and return weekly.

items.title: Manual Concierge Onboarding for all new trials (2 calls)
items.hypothesis: White-glove setup reduces time-to-first-signal and improves week-1 activation.
items.metric: Activation rate from 55% to 75%; time-to-signal <3 days

items.title: Slack Check-in Noise Reduction (cadence calibration)
items.hypothesis: Reducing false positives and matching team cadence lowers churn drivers.

items.title: In-product Referral Nudge (manager share link)
items.hypothesis: Prompting satisfied managers after 2 digests will increase referral trials.

items.title: Privacy & Data Handling Page + DPIA summary
items.hypothesis: Clear documentation unblocks trials in compliance-conscious orgs.
items.metric: Trial start rate +15% at enterprise leads

items.title: Pricing Experiment: per-manager vs per-team
items.hypothesis: Per-team pricing reduces friction for larger orgs and improves POC-to-paid.

items.title: SOC 2 Scoping (desk research + gap list)
items.hypothesis: Understanding scope now prevents wasted builds; defer full certification.
items.metric: Documented gaps; decision doc for when to start

items.title: OKR Integration
items.hypothesis: Linking OKRs to health will improve exec adoption.

items.title: Systematic Churn Interviews (5 recent churned trials)
items.hypothesis: Understanding top-2 churn reasons will guide retention fixes.
items.metric: List of top-2 reasons validated by 5 calls

items.title: Activation Checklist inside product (manager first week)
items.hypothesis: A visible checklist reduces setup confusion and increases activation.
